impact: This advances the PP&D agent loop by converting incomplete process state into safe user-facing questions while proving fixtures do not suggest submission, upload, payment, certification, cancellation, or inspection scheduling.
summary: Add a fixture-only PP&D agent missing-information response plan with validation for unresolved facts, document placeholders, stale evidence, and stop gates.
target_task: Task checkbox-115: Task checkbox-110: Add a fixture-only agent missing-information response plan that turns unresolved PP&D facts, required document placeholders, stale evidence flags, and default stop gates into user-facing questions without suggesting submission, upload, payment, certification, cancellation, or inspection scheduling.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
